summary: Iteration 66: Sustainability Dashboard feature testing complete. 10/10 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI components verified: Eco-Counter CO2, Forest Effect, Circular Gauge, KPI Strip, Trend Chart, CO2 per Commessa chart, Commesse/Fornitori/Metodi tables. Year selector works. Sidebar shows updated 'Sostenibilita & CO2' label. Minor fix applied: added missing sustainability fields to empty state API response.

minor.issue: Empty state response was missing sustainability fields (alberi_equivalenti, indice_economia_circolare, co2_per_commessa, trend_mensile)
minor.fix_applied: Added missing fields to empty state return block in /app/backend/routes/cam.py line 453-470

frontend_ui_tests.year_selector: PASS - select-anno works, filters data by year
frontend_ui_tests.pdf_button: PASS - btn-download-pdf enabled when data exists
frontend_ui_tests.eco_counter_card: PASS - Shows CO2 saved kg, % vs primario, tCO2e
frontend_ui_tests.forest_effect_card: PASS - Shows alberi equivalenti with tree visualization
frontend_ui_tests.circular_gauge_card: PASS - Shows index % with gauge chart and rating badge
frontend_ui_tests.kpi_strip: PASS - Shows 5 mini KPIs (Acciaio Totale, Riciclato, Commesse, Lotti, Riduzione CO2)
frontend_ui_tests.trend_chart: PASS - Area chart shows monthly CO2 trend
frontend_ui_tests.co2_per_commessa_chart: PASS - Horizontal bar chart shows CO2 per commessa
frontend_ui_tests.commesse_table: PASS - Table with peso, riciclato, %, stato (Conforme badge)
frontend_ui_tests.fornitori_table: PASS - Breakdown per fornitore with lotti count
frontend_ui_tests.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'Nessun dato CAM per il {anno}'

critical_code_review_comments: CO2 calculation correctly uses World Steel Association factors: EAF=0.67 tCO2/t, BOF=2.33 tCO2/t
alberi_equivalenti uses EEA factor: 1 tree absorbs ~22 kg CO2/year
indice_economia_circolare is weighted average % of recycled steel
Frontend uses Recharts for AreaChart (trend) and BarChart (CO2 per commessa)
Empty state returns consistent structure with all sustainability fields zeroed
UI has proper data-testid attributes for all major components
test_credentials: Created and cleaned up test sessions (test_session_sustain_*, test_session_ui_*)
seed_data_creation: Created 3 CAM lotti for backend tests, 3 for frontend tests - all cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sustainability Dashboard feature fully implemented. Backend returns new fields: alberi_equivalenti (co2_risparmiata_kg/22), indice_economia_circolare (same as percentuale_riciclato_media), co2_per_commessa (array with CO2 per commessa breakdown), trend_mensile (monthly aggregation). Frontend page at /report-cam has 3 hero cards (Eco-Counter, Forest Effect, Circular Gauge), KPI strip with 5 mini-KPIs, 2 Recharts (AreaChart for trend, BarChart for CO2 per commessa), and 3 data tables (commesse, fornitori, metodi). All have data-testid attributes. Empty state shows localized message. Year selector filters data.
rca_of_the_issue: Minor bug found and fixed: The empty state return block in report_aziendale_cam() was missing the new sustainability fields (alberi_equivalenti, indice_economia_circolare, co2_per_commessa, trend_mensile). These were added at lines 453-470 to ensure consistent API response structure.
